title: pygeum robustum
intro: Pygeum robustum, also known as African cherry or Prunus africana, is a plant species native to central and western Africa. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting medicinal properties that are rich in phytosterols and fatty acids. The health benefits of pygeum robustum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of an enlarged prostate, improve urinary flow, and reduce inflammation. Pygeum robustum is often prepared for herbal use through the form of capsules, tablets, or tinctures, which can be used to support prostate health and overall well-being.
